name: Charcoaled Squid- Pla Muk Yang
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut open the squid and remove the entrails, leaving the tentacles intact.
2. Remove the skin from the squid.
3. Place the squid on a rack over charcoal and broil for 2 minutes on each side.
4. Brush the squid with the combined fish sauce and soy sauce during broiling to add color and flavor.
5. Mix together the sauce ingredients in a bowl.
6. Cut the cooked squid into 1-inch pieces.
7. Serve the squid pieces with the dipping sauce.
